case_title: CALIF. SERVICE BUREAU OF MARIN COUNTY, INC., vs. SMITH, FELICITAS et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIF. SERVICE BUREAU OF MARIN COUNTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, FELICITAS FIRST DOE THROUGH TENTH DOE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-01-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-12-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-01-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-01-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-01-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1993, CONTINUED TO FEB-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF SHALL GIVE NOTICE TO DEFT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
